name: Ariège (France)
description: Paly of gold and red (the arms of the counts of Foix), charged at the centre with a blue shield bearing a silver bell — the arms of the département of Ariège.
history: Combines the gold-and-red pales of the counts of Foix with a bell for the Couserans, the two historic territories of the département of Ariège.

features.role: paly of gold and red — the arms of the counts of Foix
a blue shield bearing a silver bell (for the Couserans)
